title: dev.export
description: Export a JSON snapshot of the contract registry and recent-calls buffer to a user-chosen file path. Only available in dev-tools builds. Paths are redacted by default; opt in to verbatim paths per export.

outputPath.description: Absolute filesystem path where the JSON export should be written. Must be inside a user-accessible location; validated against path.write.denied envelope.

includeVerbatimPaths.description: When false (default), filesystem paths in the export are replaced with ${LIBRARY_ROOT}/... placeholders. When true, verbatim paths are included. This is a per-export opt-in only; the in-memory ring buffer always stores redacted paths.

includeContracts.description: Include the full contract registry list in the export.

includeCalls.description: Include the recent-calls buffer in the export.

writtenPath.description: Absolute path of the written export file.

callCount.description: Number of call records included in the export.

contractCount.description: Number of contract records included in the export.

errorCodes.message: Developer mode is disabled. Export is not available.
The output path is outside the allowed write envelope.
The export file could not be written. Check disk space and permissions.
